summary: Completed testing of Multi-edition UPC/IPC Plumbing Code feature (Iteration 8). All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including UPC/IPC toggle, edition selector (2015/2018/2021/2024), search functionality, chapter accordion, quick jump chips, and quick reference footer cards with code-specific values.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Play server-side verification is MOCKED - currently trusts purchase tokens from client without calling Google Play Developer API (carried over from previous iterations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested the new Multi-edition UPC/IPC Plumbing Code feature. All functionality verified: PlumbingCodePage loads at /plumbing-code, UPC/IPC toggle works (data-testid='code-type-upc', 'code-type-ipc'), edition dropdown works (data-testid='edition-selector'), badge updates correctly (data-testid='code-edition-badge'), search filters chapters (data-testid='plumbing-code-search'), accordion expands/collapses (data-testid='section-{code}'), quick jump chips scroll to chapters (data-testid='chip-{id}'), footer cards show code-specific values (UPC: 2-1/2" threshold, 2" WC vent; IPC: 3" threshold, 1-1/2" WC vent).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code/types returns UPC and IPC with 4 editions each
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?code_type=upc&edition=2024 returns 13 chapters
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?code_type=upc&edition=2015 returns 12 chapters (no Ch16)
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?code_type=ipc&edition=2024 returns 10 chapters
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?code_type=ipc&edition=2021 returns 10 chapters
Backend: UPC Chapter 2 Definitions has correct structure with sections
Backend: IPC Chapter 2 has different section codes than UPC (201.1 vs 201.0)
Backend: Search 'trap' returns filtered chapters including ch10
Backend: Search 'slope' returns drainage-related chapters
Backend: Search non-existent term returns empty results
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code/ch2 returns specific chapter
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code/ch99 returns 404
Backend: UPC 2024 shows 4 DFU for water closet
Backend: UPC 2015 shows 3 DFU for water closet
Backend: API health check passes
Backend: API root endpoint returns PlumbPro message
Frontend: Landing page loads with promo banner (85 spots remaining)
Frontend: Login with testplumber@test.com / Test1234! redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Navigation to /plumbing-code via sidebar works
Frontend: PlumbingCodePage component loads (data-testid='plumbing-code-page')
Frontend: UPC button found and clickable (data-testid='code-type-upc')
Frontend: IPC button found and clickable (data-testid='code-type-ipc')
Frontend: Edition selector found (data-testid='edition-selector')
Frontend: Badge shows 'UPC 2024 (IAPMO)' initially
Frontend: Badge updates to 'IPC 2024 (ICC)' after IPC click
Frontend: Badge updates to 'IPC 2015 (ICC)' after edition change
Frontend: Badge updates to 'UPC 2015 (IAPMO)' after UPC click
Frontend: Search input found (data-testid='plumbing-code-search')
Frontend: Search 'trap' returns 6 filtered chapters
Frontend: Clearing search restores all 13 chapters
Frontend: Quick jump chips found (data-testid='quick-jump-chips')
Frontend: Clicking Ch. 10 chip scrolls to chapter
Frontend: Accordion section expands on click showing content
Frontend: UPC footer shows 2-1/2" drain pipe slope threshold
Frontend: UPC footer shows 2" Water Closet vent size
Frontend: IPC footer shows 3" drain pipe slope threshold
Frontend: IPC footer shows 1-1/2" Water Closet vent size

mocked_apis.google_play_server_verification: Server-side Google Play Developer API verification is stubbed. Currently trusts purchase tokens from client and records them without calling Google API. Full verification requires Google Cloud Service Account JSON.
